{% if section_data is defined %}
{{ section_data.title }}
{% for page in section_data.pages %} {% set is_active = current_path is defined and page.path == current_path %} {{ page.title }} {% endfor %} {% if section_data.subsections is defined %} {% for subsection_path in section_data.subsections %} {% set subsection = get_section(path=subsection_path) %}
{{ subsection.title }}
{% for page in subsection.pages %} {% set is_active = current_path is defined and page.path == current_path %} {{ page.title }} {% endfor %}
{% endfor %} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
